Tags

  • v0.1.5

Same frequency coupling (sfc)¶

This package provides a number of different same frequency connectivity metrics.

  • Directional absolute coherence
    • run_dac()
    • run_dac()
    • run_dac()
  • Phase slope index
    • run_psi()
    • run_psi()
    • run_psi()
  • Weighted phase lag index
    • run_wpli()
    • run_wpli()
    • run_wpli()
  • Imaginary coherence
    • run_ic()
    • run_ic()
    • run_ic()
  • Magnitude squared coherence
    • run_msc()
    • run_msc()
    • run_msc()
  • Complex coherency
    • run_cc()
    • run_cc()
